basic_details.job_title: Jangaon District Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Senior TB Lab Supervisor and Lab Technician Posts
basic_details.post_name: Senior TB Lab Supervisor and Lab Technician
basic_details.short_information: Jangaon District Senior TB Lab Supervisor and Lab Technician Notification 2026 has been released on 09 June 2026 on the official website of Jangaon District. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the Jangaon District Senior TB Lab Supervisor and Lab Technician Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 46 years Age Relaxation: For SCs, STs, BCs & EWS: 5 years; For Ex-service men: 3 years; For NCC (Instructor): 3 years + length of service; For Physically challenged: 10 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate, Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology, Intermediate (10+2), Certified course in Medical Laboratory Technology
qualification.details: Senior TB Lab Supervisor: Graduate; Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology OR Equivalent from a Government recognized institution; Permanent two wheeler driving license & should be able to drive two wheeler; Certificate course in computer operations (minimum two months); Minimum One year experience in RNTCP / NTEP. Lab Technician: Intermediate (10+2) and Diploma OR Certified course in Medical Laboratory Technology OR Equivalent; One year experience in RNTCP / NTEP OR Sputum smear microscopy; Candidates with Higher qualification (for example Graduates) shall be preferred.

salary_details.details: Senior TB Lab Supervisor: Rs. 22,100 Per Month Lab Technician: Rs. 27,300 Per Month

selection_process: Merit Basis 90 marks from qualifying examination 10 marks for age (0.5 per completed year from 18) Rule of Reservation
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://jangaon.telangana.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download Jangaon District Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Jangaon District Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application form for the Jangaon District Recruitment 2026 is 15th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Senior TB Lab Supervisor and Lab Technician posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the Senior TB Lab Supervisor and Lab Technician posts in Jangaon District Recruitment 2026. One vacancy is for Senior TB Lab Supervisor and two are for Lab Technician.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Lab Technician post?
faq.answer: For the Lab Technician post, candidates must have completed Intermediate (10+2) and possess a Diploma or Certified course in Medical Laboratory Technology or its equivalent. Higher qualifications like graduation are preferred.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for all posts is a minimum of 18 years and a maximum of 46 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for Jangaon District Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Jangaon District Recruitment 2026. Candidates can apply without paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these government jobs?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on merit. Marks will be awarded from the qualifying examination (90 marks) and for age (10 marks). The rule of reservation will also be applied during the selection.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Senior TB Lab Supervisor post?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Senior TB Lab Supervisor post is Rs. 22,100 per month. This is a contract-based position.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary offered for the Lab Technician post?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Lab Technician post is Rs. 27,300 per month. This is also a contract-based position.

faq.question: Q9. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Jangaon District Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as instructed in the notification.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Jangaon District, which is https://jangaon.telangana.gov.in. It is recommended to check the website for the most up-to-date information.
